title: h-mad orchestrator_state per-feature schema (historical tier)
description: Accepts what pre-v2.2 runs actually wrote. The v2.2 schema was never enforced at write time and forbade extra properties, so an established store drifts to many one-off shapes: string phase labels ('complete', 'phase7_closure', 'step7'), epoch-int timestamps, per-phase cycle keys (plan_audit_cycles), and assorted sha keys. This tier requires only the three fields present in every record observed, so a genuinely broken record still fails while historical drift does not.

current_phase.description: v2.2 uses 0-7; historical records also use labels such as 'complete' or 'phase4_design'.

last_completed_phase.description: v2.2 uses 0-7; historical records also use 'phase7', 'phase7_closure', 'step7', 'step7_closure', '7'.

phase.description: v2.2 restricts to step5/step6/step7/null; historical records also carry 'complete'.

autonomous_entry_ts.description: Integer form is a unix epoch written by some runs.
